name: Peewee (Lightweight Python ORM)

performance.notes: Lightweight; minimal overhead vs raw SQL

agent_readiness.notes: Small, expressive Python ORM. class User(Model): username = CharField(). User.create(username='alice'). User.select().where(User.active==True). Supports: SQLite, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB. Django-like API. Migrations via playhouse.migrate. JSON fields. Full-text search. Connection pool. Atomic transactions. Model.save()/delete(). No async (sync only). Less boilerplate than SQLAlchemy Core. Best for small-medium projects.

gotchas: Sync only — not suitable for async FastAPI/Starlette (use tortoise-orm or SQLAlchemy async)
Less powerful than SQLAlchemy for complex queries
best_when: Small-medium Python projects with simple CRUD
Scripts and tools needing quick DB access
SQLite-based applications (scripts, desktop apps, test fixtures)
avoid_when: Async Python frameworks (FastAPI, Starlette — use SQLAlchemy async or tortoise-orm)
Complex queries requiring advanced SQLAlchemy Core features
summary: Peewee is a small, expressive Python ORM with a Django-like API. class User(Model): username = CharField(). User.create(), User.select().where(). Supports SQLite/PostgreSQL/MySQL. Sync only (not for async frameworks). Best for small projects, scripts, and Flask apps where SQLAlchemy's weight is unnecessary. JSON fields, full-text search, connection pooling via playhouse.
